xs.$description: 16px fixed icon size. Does not react to any mode; size remains stable regardless of component_size mode changes.

sm.$description: 20px fixed icon size. Does not react to any mode; size remains stable regardless of component_size mode changes.

md.$description: 24px fixed icon size. Does not react to any mode; size remains stable regardless of component_size mode changes.

lg.$description: 32px fixed icon size. Does not react to any mode; size remains stable regardless of component_size mode changes.

body.$description: Fixed icon size for body text. Does not react to any mode; size remains stable regardless of typography_context mode changes.

xs.$description: Smallest icon size. Use only in edge cases where alignment or space constraints require it. Reacts to component_size mode.

sm.$description: Small icon size. Use sparingly; prefer md unless space is constrained. Reacts to component_size mode.

md.$description: Default icon size for components. Reacts to component_size mode.

lg.$description: Large icon size. Use when additional visual prominence is required. Reacts to component_size mode.

body.$description: Inline icon size for body text only. Reacts to typography_context mode.

offset.$description: 2px in interface mode for body only upward correction for optical baseline alignment of inline icons with adjacent capital letters. Approximates 0.125em at 16px base font size. Static: the 0.5px prose-mode difference (2.5px) has no valid primitive.
